title: Rage Lifesteal
description: RageLifesteal is a customizable Lifesteal SMP plugin for Paper, developed by Perplexed Studios. It brings the popular Lifesteal mechanics to your SMP while keeping it lightweight, simple, and fully configurable.
body:
RageLifesteal is a powerful and customizable Lifesteal SMP plugin built for Paper. It adds the popular Lifesteal mechanics to your survival server, making every fight more intense and rewarding. Players gain hearts when they kill others, and lose hearts when they die. If a player’s hearts reach 0, they are permanently banned until revived with a Revive Beacon or the /pardon command.

The plugin includes custom items like Heart Fragments, Hearts, and Revive Beacons, all craftable in a normal crafting table. Players can view recipes with /lsrecipe and manage hearts with /lswithdraw or /lsdonate. Admins have access to extra commands like /lsgive, /ban, and /tempban.

With a fully editable config.yml, RageLifesteal is easy to set up, lightweight, and works out-of-the-box with GeyserMC, ViaVersion, and ViaBackwards.

Bring the Lifesteal SMP experience to your friends with RageLifesteal by Perplexed Studios!
